SEARCH
Module geomed.app
Package geomed.app

Class ConsoleRunner

java.lang.Object
geomed.app.ConsoleRunner
public class ConsoleRunner extends Object
The ConsoleRunner class serves as the command-line interface entry point for the application. It provides a robust interface to test the medical dispatch logic (Voronoi/Delaunay related models) without requiring the JavaFX graphical interface. * @version 3.0

  • Constructor Summary

      public ConsoleRunner()

  • Method Details

    • main

      public static void main(String[] args)
      Main entry point for the console application. Handles the main menu loop.
      Parameters:
      args - Command line arguments (optional file mode override).

    • randomTest

      public static void randomTest(Scanner sc, int nbHospitals)
      Performs an automated test by generating random hospitals and victim incidents.
      Parameters:
      sc - The Scanner object for input.
      nbHospitals - The number of hospitals to generate.

    • displayAdvancedHospitalStats

      public static void displayAdvancedHospitalStats(Set<Hospital> hospitals)
      Displays advanced operational and distance statistics for all active hospitals. * @param hospitals The list of hospitals to inspect.

    • displayTriangles

      public static void displayTriangles(List<Triangle> triangles)
      Displays the triangles with advanced geometric and operational metrics.
      Parameters:
      triangles - The list of triangles provided by the Delaunay triangulation engine.

    • displayVoronoiCells

      public static void displayVoronoiCells(List<VoronoiCell> cells)
      Displays the calculated Voronoi cells and their sorted vertices in the console.
      Parameters:
      cells - The list of Voronoi cells provided by MapManager.

    • displayRoutes

      public static void displayRoutes(List<VictimIncident> incidents)
      Displays the calculated optimal routes for each active incident. * @param incidents The list of VictimIncidents provided by MapManager.

    • askNaturalNumber

      public static int askNaturalNumber(Scanner sc, String msg)
      Helper method to robustly ask for a natural number.
      Parameters:
      sc - The Scanner object for user input.
      msg - The contextual prompt message.
      Returns:
      A valid integer strictly greater than 0.
